name: Frittelle De Corleone
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Marsala wine or Sherry, sweet
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the raisins in Marsala for 30 minutes.
2. Drain the raisins and reserve the wine. In a mixing bowl, combine flour and salt.
3. Gradually blend in the wine until smooth.
4. Stir in the egg yolks and just enough oil to achieve a thick cream sauce consistency.
5. Heat 1 inch of oil to 375°F (190°C) in a large skillet.
6. Using about 3 tablespoons of batter per fritter, carefully drop into the oil.
7. Fry until golden brown, turning once, for 4 to 5 minutes.
8. Drain on paper towels. Repeat with remaining batter.
9. Dust with powdered sugar and serve hot.
